notes: Added a Supabase-backed hosted access layer for long-term role management, feature flags, and audit logs.
Removed the service-account Google Sheet role-store model from the hosted Developer panel.
Developer role assignments can now be saved to Supabase when configured; bootstrap developer/beta lists in Streamlit secrets still work as fallback.
Clarified that Supabase is for hosted access control only and should not store Pathmark goals, routines, Workspace files, or on-the-go planning entries.
